name: testy-mc-testface
description: Configuration-driven black-box testing platform for GL-EYE and compatible systems.

scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @testy/shared-types build && pnpm --filter @testy/vendor-schema build && pnpm -r --if-present typecheck
scripts.vendor:validate: pnpm --filter @testy/vendor-schema build && pnpm --filter @testy/config-loader exec tsx src/cli.ts ../../vendors/ipinfo
scripts.vendor:compile: pnpm --filter @testy/vendor-schema build && pnpm --filter @testy/config-loader build && pnpm --filter @testy/vendor-compiler exec tsx src/cli.ts ../../vendors/ipinfo ../../generated/vendors
scripts.vendor:runtime: pnpm --filter @testy/vendor-schema build && pnpm --filter @testy/config-loader build && pnpm --filter @testy/vendor-compiler build && pnpm --filter @testy/vendor-runtime exec tsx src/cli.ts ../../vendors/ipinfo ../../generated/runtime
scripts.vendor:smoke: pnpm --filter @testy/vendor-schema build && pnpm --filter @testy/config-loader build && pnpm --filter @testy/vendor-compiler build && pnpm --filter @testy/vendor-runtime exec tsx src/stateful-smoke-cli.ts ../../vendors/ipinfo ../../generated/smoke
scripts.privacy:ipinfo: pnpm privacy:prepare && pnpm --filter @testy/privacy-validation exec node dist/cli.js ../../vendors/ipinfo
scripts.privacy:apollo: pnpm privacy:prepare && pnpm --filter @testy/privacy-validation exec node dist/cli.js ../../vendors/apollo
scripts.privacy:hunter: pnpm privacy:prepare && pnpm --filter @testy/privacy-validation exec node dist/cli.js ../../vendors/hunter
scripts.privacy:vendors: pnpm privacy:ipinfo && pnpm privacy:apollo && pnpm privacy:hunter
scripts.vendor:contract:ipinfo: pnpm vendor:contract:prepare && pnpm --filter @testy/vendor-contract exec node dist/cli.js ../../vendors/ipinfo ../../generated/contracts
scripts.vendor:contract:apollo: pnpm vendor:contract:prepare && pnpm --filter @testy/vendor-contract exec node dist/cli.js ../../vendors/apollo ../../generated/contracts
scripts.vendor:contract:hunter: pnpm vendor:contract:prepare && pnpm --filter @testy/vendor-contract exec node dist/cli.js ../../vendors/hunter ../../generated/contracts
scripts.vendor:contracts: pnpm vendor:contract:ipinfo && pnpm vendor:contract:apollo && pnpm vendor:contract:hunter
scripts.vendor:isolation:ipinfo: pnpm vendor:contract:prepare && pnpm --filter @testy/vendor-contract exec node dist/isolation-cli.js ../../vendors/ipinfo ../../generated/isolation
scripts.vendor:isolation:apollo: pnpm vendor:contract:prepare && pnpm --filter @testy/vendor-contract exec node dist/isolation-cli.js ../../vendors/apollo ../../generated/isolation
scripts.vendor:isolation:hunter: pnpm vendor:contract:prepare && pnpm --filter @testy/vendor-contract exec node dist/isolation-cli.js ../../vendors/hunter ../../generated/isolation
scripts.vendor:isolations: pnpm vendor:isolation:ipinfo && pnpm vendor:isolation:apollo && pnpm vendor:isolation:hunter
scripts.browser:validate: pnpm browser:prepare && pnpm --filter @testy/browser-config exec node dist/cli.js ../../customers/customer-alpha
scripts.site:serve: pnpm --filter @testy/synthetic-site-host build && pnpm --filter @testy/synthetic-site-host exec node dist/cli.js ../../customers/customer-alpha
scripts.browser:run: pnpm --filter @testy/browser-runner build && pnpm --filter @testy/browser-runner exec node dist/cli.js ../../customers/customer-alpha lead-capture ../../generated/browser
scripts.ci: pnpm format:check && pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm build
